content:
# Java Island

**Summary**: A large island in Indonesia located in a highly active subduction zone.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-latif|Latif, 2015]] focused on the seismic hazard of Java Island.

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] studied the sedimentary systems on Java Island.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-latif|Latif, 2015]] Meeting point of several tectonic plates (Eurasian, Indian-Australian, Philippine Sea, and Pacific).

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] studied the sedimentary systems on Java Island.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- The region is densely populated and lacks specific ground-motion relations, making local models critical for infrastructure safety. ([[2015-latif|Latif, 2015, p. 26]])

- Merapi is an active stratovolcano situated in the middle of Java Island (7.54°S, 110.446°E). ([[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022, p. 26]])
